I'm proud of my description of Heat: Pedal to the Medal as "Dominion meets Candyland".

data.body:
This is me! My favorite line in The Mummy, an excellent and quotable film, is "I'M the map."

It's in my head. And even without a detailed map, I know I'm HERE and the destination is THERE and I can triangulate my way.

And my navigation will beat the computer every time.
